input.title: Propose global standard for verifier evidence
input.text: This broad decomp standard should apply to worker, writer, QA, and PR-review contexts.

classification.reason: Evidence proposes a broad decomp/review standard; standards source owner should review before changing global injected rules.

input.title: Propose path fact for item accessors

classification.reason: Evidence proposes a scoped known win for a directory or path; path facts source owner should validate scope, stale checks, and provenance before applying.
